description: Multi-plugin parameter randomizer VST3/Standalone. Hosts multiple VST3 plugins in series or parallel (bus-based routing), exposes all their parameters, and modulates them via configurable logic blocks (randomize, envelope follower, sample modulator, morph pad, shapes LFO, shapes range, lane automation). WebView2-based UI with real-time visualization, modulation arc display, 10 themes, granular undo/redo, visibility-culled rendering, async plugin loading, and hosted-plugin gesture detection.

source_files.PluginProcessor.cpp: 1370+ lines — Constructor, lifecycle, createParameterLayout, updateLogicBlocks (with paramTouched cleanup), state save/restore, sample modulator API, GestureListener registration, rebuildPluginSlots with safe listener removal, JUCE boilerplate
source_files.ProcessBlock.cpp: 1862 lines — processBlock (audio pipeline), SEH crash guard, logic block engine (all 7 block types incl. lane), glide processing, NaN sanitization, dry/wet mix, depth-zero skip for shapes_range
source_files.PluginHosting.cpp: 540+ lines — Plugin scan, findPluginDescription (thread-safe), instantiatePlugin (COM-safe), remove, param access, proxy parameter pool, DAW automation bridge, glide FIFO API
source_files.PluginProcessor.h: 820+ lines — All data structures (HostedPlugin, LogicBlock, GestureListener, ProxyParameter, readback FIFOs, crash event FIFO, pluginSlots[32] O(1) lookup, paramTouched atomic flags)
source_files.PluginEditor.cpp: 1300+ lines — WebView2 bridge, 20+ native functions, async plugin loading, 2-tier real-time polling with visibility culling, crash notification relay
source_files.PluginEditor.h: 130+ lines — Editor class with WebView, relays, attachments, expandedPluginIds, paramIdentCache, modulatedParamKeys

ui_modules.index.html: Main HTML shell with all panels and modals
ui_modules.js/state.js: Global state variables and data structures
ui_modules.js/juce_bridge.js: JUCE WebView native function bridge helpers
ui_modules.js/juce_integration.js: JUCE relay/attachment integration for MIX and BYPASS
ui_modules.js/theme_system.js: 10 themes with comprehensive CSS variable system (100+ vars per theme), settings panel, dynamic slider styling
ui_modules.js/undo_system.js: Granular undo/redo: single param (setParam), multi-param (applyParamBatch), full-state (applyParamBatch) entry types
ui_modules.js/plugin_rack.js: Plugin card rendering, param display, knob SVGs, drag-to-assign, bulk select, loading feedback, visibility culling, scroll-based dirty tracking
ui_modules.js/logic_blocks.js: Block card rendering, morph pad, shapes pad, wiring, all block UIs, batch randomize (applyParamBatch)
ui_modules.js/context_menus.js: Right-click menus for params and plugins (lock/unlock, bypass, presets)
ui_modules.js/preset_system.js: Per-plugin presets (batch IPC), global presets (batch IPC), search, type toggle, delete confirmation, dirty indicator
ui_modules.js/realtime.js: RT data listener, envelope/sample/morph readback, auto-locate, crash toast, live BPM display, visibility-culled param refresh
ui_modules.js/controls.js: Header controls, keyboard shortcuts, collapse/expand all, plugin loading state, themed toast notifications
ui_modules.js/persistence.js: State save/restore to/from processor (survives editor close/reopen)

css_modules: css/variables.css — 110+ CSS custom properties with defaults
css/header.css — Bus group/header/mute/solo styling with CSS variable theming
css/plugin_rack.css — Loading cards, preset flash, parameter rows (6-row fixed layout)

plugin_hosting.vst3_scanning: Recursive filesystem scan of user-configured directories

plugin_loading.async: Two-phase async loading: disk scan on background thread, COM instantiation on message thread
plugin_loading.findPluginDescription: Phase 1 — thread-safe cache lookup + disk scan (no UI freeze)
plugin_loading.instantiatePlugin: Phase 2 — createPluginInstance + bus layout + prepareToPlay (message thread, COM-safe)
plugin_loading.loadPlugin: Convenience wrapper calling both phases in sequence (used by setStateInformation)

plugin_hosting.serial_processing: Hosted plugins process audio in series (chain order)

parallel_processing.bus_system: Up to 8 parallel buses, plugins assigned to buses via UI badge

bus_ui.color_coding: Per-theme bus color palettes (8 colors per theme), 10px color dot with glow
bus_ui.header_strip: Bus name, volume slider, mute/solo buttons, collapse chevron
bus_ui.tint_system: color-mix() based background tinting (8-12% group, 16-22% header) via --bus-tint CSS variable
bus_ui.badge_dropdown: Colored bus assignment dropdown on plugin cards with --bus-badge-text theming

parallel_processing.equal_gain: Output summed with 1/sqrt(N) equal-gain compensation per active bus
parallel_processing.single_bus_optimization: Falls back to sequential path when only 1 bus is active
parallel_processing.zero_allocation: 8 pre-allocated bus buffers in prepareToPlay, atomic routing mode toggle
parallel_processing.crash_rollback: Uses reserved 8th buffer as scratch for crash rollback (no audio-thread allocation)

plugin_hosting.plugin_editor_windows: Native floating editor windows for each hosted plugin

crash_protection.seh_guard: Windows Structured Exception Handling (__try/__except) catches access violations and stack overflows in processBlock
crash_protection.cpp_exception_guard: try/catch(...) wraps all hosted plugin processBlock calls
crash_protection.nan_inf_sanitization: Post-plugin output buffer scan replaces NaN/Inf with 0.0f
crash_protection.auto_bypass: Crashed plugins are immediately bypassed, buffer rolled back to pre-crash state
crash_protection.crash_notification: Lock-free FIFO relays crash events to UI as themed toast notifications with re-enable button
crash_protection.reset_crash: Users can re-enable crashed plugins via UI button (re-prepares the plugin)

types.randomize: Discrete parameter randomization with range, quantize, glide. Batch IPC via applyParamBatch (1 call for N params)
types.sample: Audio file modulator (WAV/AIFF/FLAC/MP3/OGG), loop/oneshot/pingpong modes, speed control, reverse, jump modes
types.morph_pad: XY pad with up to 12 snapshots, IDW interpolation, manual/auto/trigger modes
types.shapes: Geometric LFO with 11 shape types, depth/speed/spin controls, tracking modes
types.shapes_range: Per-parameter variant of shapes with individual range controls per target

common_features.targets: Any block can target any combination of hosted plugin parameters
common_features.assign_mode: Click block → click params to assign (Ctrl/Shift for multi-select, All/None bulk buttons)
common_features.polarity: Bipolar / Unipolar Up / Unipolar Down modes for relative modulation
common_features.clock_source: Per-block choice of DAW tempo or internal tempo

morph_pad.tempo_sync: BPM-synced speed with configurable beat divisions (8 bars down to 1/64)

shapes_block.per_param_ranges: shapes_range mode: individual depth per target parameter with anchor positions
shapes_block.modulation_arc: Real-time fill arc visualization on knobs showing current modulation position, driven by computeModCurrent() with unified single-path rendering

lane_block.description: Per-parameter automation lanes with drawable envelope curves
features: Per-lane depth, slew, warp, phase controls
Loop length with beat-synced or free-run timing

parameter_management.parameter_locking: Lock/unlock individual params (locked params excluded from randomization and assignment)
parameter_management.auto_locate: Scroll-to and flash parameters touched in hosted plugin's own editor
parameter_management.self_write_filtering: Logic blocks, glides, DAW automation, and JS calls are excluded from auto-locate detection
parameter_management.param_touch_tracking: Suspend modulation while user is grabbing a parameter via UI knob, hosted plugin gesture listener, or DAW automation (3-layer touch detection)
parameter_management.gesture_listeners: Per-plugin GestureListener structs detect hosted plugin UI interactions via JUCE's AudioProcessorParameter::Listener, setting paramTouched atomics for conflict-free modulation suspension
parameter_management.proxy_parameter_pool: 256-slot pool exposing hosted plugin params to DAW automation with dynamic names
parameter_management.o1_lookup: pluginSlots[32] array for O(1) parameter access by plugin ID (replacing O(N) linear scans)

preset_system.per_plugin_presets: Save/load parameter snapshots per hosted plugin with search and type toggle. Uses applyParamBatch for loading.
preset_system.snapshot_library: Browse and load presets/snapshots from any plugin into morph pad
preset_system.global_presets: Save/load entire session with dirty indicator, nav arrows, search. Uses applyParamBatch for param restore.
preset_system.delete_confirmation: Two-step delete confirmation for all preset types
preset_system.save_feedback: Visual flash confirmation on successful save (themed via --preset-flash-color/--preset-flash-glow)

visibility_culling_js.description: refreshParamDisplay pre-computes visible parameter IDs by walking expanded card DOM children against scroll bounds
visibility_culling_js.collapsed_cost: Zero — collapsed cards contribute no DOM queries

visibility_culling_cpp.description: Tier 1 (60Hz) and Tier 2 (6Hz) polling skip plugins not in expandedPluginIds set
visibility_culling_cpp.resync_on_expand: lastParamValues cleared when plugin expands → forces full value resync
visibility_culling_cpp.cache_rebuild: paramIdentCache rebuild (every 1s) also skips collapsed plugins

batch_ipc.applyParamBatch: Single IPC call for N parameter changes (JSON array of {p, i, v})

performance.o1_param_lookup: pluginSlots[32] array replaces O(N) linear scans in getParamValueFast, getParamDisplayTextFast, glide pool, randomize
performance.persistent_rng: static juce::Random messageThreadRng (no identical sequences on rapid fire)

ui_system.settings_panel: Dropdown with theme picker grid, UI scale slider, auto-locate toggle, internal tempo BPM
ui_system.ui_scale: Adjustable from 0.25x to 3x via settings dropdown

real_time_visualization.envelope_levels: Per-block envelope follower level bars (from C++ at 60Hz)
real_time_visualization.morph_playheads: Per-block XY dot position synced from C++ auto modes
real_time_visualization.shape_dots: Per-block shape dot position + SVG rotation synced from C++
real_time_visualization.shape_readout_lines: Visual tracking indicator (horizontal/vertical line or distance circle)
real_time_visualization.param_knob_svgs: Real-time SVG arc knobs with range arc overlay (visibility-culled)
real_time_visualization.param_value_text: Real-time parameter display text from plugin getText() (visibility-culled)
real_time_visualization.rms_levels: Main and sidechain audio RMS for UI

plugin_rack_layout.param_rows: Exactly 6 rows visible per plugin card (36px row height, 216px max-height)
plugin_rack_layout.scroll_culling: Only visible rows within scroll viewport are updated

ui_system.drag_and_drop: Drag params onto blocks, drag blocks to reorder

keyboard_shortcuts.escape: Close modals / exit assign mode / clear selection
keyboard_shortcuts.delete: Remove selected params from active block
keyboard_shortcuts.ctrl_a: Select all unlocked params (in assign mode)

undo_redo.param_undo: Single knob change → setParam (1 IPC call)
undo_redo.multi_param_undo: Randomize/preset load → applyParamBatch (1 IPC call for N params)
undo_redo.full_state_undo: Structural changes → applyParamBatch for params + block/plugin restore

ui_system.live_bpm: Status bar shows actual DAW BPM at ~4Hz refresh

plugin_loading_feedback.loading_card: Placeholder card with pulse animation and progress bar
plugin_loading_feedback.async_loading: Background thread scan → message thread instantiate (UI stays responsive)

toast_notifications.theming: Colors driven by CSS variables (--toast-success-bg/border, etc.)

ui_system.preset_flash: Border glow animation on preset load, themed via --preset-flash-color/--preset-flash-glow
ui_system.collapse_expand_all: Buttons to collapse/expand all plugin cards at once
ui_system.crash_toast: Red slide-in notification when hosted plugin crashes, with re-enable button

audio_engine.sidechain_input: Optional sidechain bus for audio-triggered blocks
audio_engine.midi_input: Full MIDI note and CC support with channel filtering
audio_engine.glide_engine: Lock-free FIFO (512 slots) for smooth per-buffer parameter interpolation
audio_engine.internal_tempo: Independent BPM clock (per-block selectable: DAW or internal)
audio_engine.sample_accurate_triggers: Tempo-synced triggers use PPQ position for beat-accurate firing

audio_thread_safety.mutex_pattern: try_to_lock in processBlock prevents priority inversion
audio_thread_safety.zombie_modulation_fix: Enum comparison (BlockMode::Shapes) instead of string comparison for mode checks
audio_thread_safety.persistent_rng: static Random in randomizeParams, member Random in processor for audio thread

state_persistence.processor_state: Saves/restores all hosted plugins (paths + param values) and UI state in DAW project
state_persistence.ui_state: Full JSON serialization of blocks, mappings, locks, theme, scale — survives editor close/reopen
state_persistence.plugin_id_patching: Restored plugin IDs match saved IDs to preserve block target references
state_persistence.null_safe_restore: All numeric fields use != null checks to prevent data loss when user value is 0 (fixes 15+ silent restore bugs from || operator)

native_functions: loadPlugin(pluginPath) → { id, name, params[] } (async: bg thread scan → msg thread instantiate)
applyParamBatch(jsonString) — [{p, i, v}, ...] in one IPC call
rt_events: __rt_data__ → { rms, scRms, bpm, playing, ppq, midi[], envLevels[], trigFired[], sampleHeads[], morphHeads[], params[], touchedParam }

phase_history.notes: Multi-plugin support with collapsible, drag-reorderable plugin cards. Plugin Browser modal with search, category filtering. Relative randomization mode. Persistent block colors. Scoped parameter IDs.
Full C++/WebView2 implementation. VST3 + Standalone build successful.
Polarity control (bipolar/unipolar up/down), auto-locate with self-write filtering, per-plugin bypass.
Morph Pad logic block: XY pad, snapshots, IDW interpolation, manual/auto/trigger modes, 5 explore modes (wander/bounce/shapes/orbit/path), tempo sync, snap radius, snapshot library.
Internal tempo control, per-block clock source (DAW/internal), Shapes block and Shapes Range block with 11 geometric shapes, tracking modes, spin, per-param ranges.
Static analysis pass: normalization fixes, SVG rendering fixes, scope issues, dead code removal.
SEH crash guard (Windows), C++ exception guard, NaN/Inf output sanitization, auto-bypass with UI toast notification, safe plugin loading, plugin crash reset.

Preset UX overhaul (search, nav arrows, dirty indicator, delete confirmation, save feedback, type toggle). Granular undo/redo system. Keyboard shortcuts. Live BPM display. Plugin loading feedback. Collapse/expand all. Parallel plugin routing with bus-based processing.
CSS variable audit: all missing defaults added to variables.css. All 10 themes verified for complete coverage. Added Slate Studio, Vintage Console, Win98, Warm Tape themes.
Lock-free audio thread: pluginSlots[32] O(1) lookup, persistent RNG, zombie modulation fix (enum comparison), batch IPC for randomize.

Two-layer visibility culling (JS DOM skip + C++ polling skip for collapsed plugins). Tier 2 getText fix (only calls getText on changed params). Batch IPC for undo/redo/preset load (applyParamBatch). Cache rebuild skips collapsed plugins. Async plugin loading (background thread scan + message thread instantiate). Bus UI overhaul (thicker borders, stronger tints, bigger dots, --bus-badge-text). Toast/preset flash theming (10 new CSS variables across all themes).

Modulation arc visualization on parameter knobs: real-time fill arc showing current modulation position. computeModCurrent() unified rendering path. getModArcInfo() range/base/color extraction from blocks.

Hosted plugin UI gesture detection (GestureListener per-plugin with safe removeListener before destroy). Fixed crash from dangling listener pointers. Shapes_range depth-zero skip prevents blocking unmodulated params. Targeted paramTouched cleanup on block config changes (mode/target changes only). requestAnimationFrame for drag arc (replaces setInterval). Dirty-marking modulated params from morphHeads for continuous fill arc updates. State persistence audit: fixed 15+ data-loss bugs from || operator treating 0 as falsy (midiNote, threshold, morphSpeed, glideMs, etc.) in persistence.js and preset_system.js.

framework_selection.rationale: Multi-plugin hosting with dynamic parameter lists, plugin browser modal, drag-and-drop, morph pad XY visualization, shapes SVG animation, and real-time envelope display best served by HTML/CSS/JS via WebView2.
